overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a futuristic city skyline at blue hour with illuminated glass skyscrapers, elevated highways, and sparse traffic. The scene features a moody, desaturated color grade with rain droplets on the lens and mixed natural-artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated aerial view of futuristic downtown district

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from an elevated vantage point, overlooking the skyline and highway interchange

entered.detail: tallest skyscraper dominating the skyline with illuminated windows and futuristic architecture
cluster of modern glass and steel buildings with various heights and lighting
dense collection of high-rise buildings extending toward the horizon
multi-level highway system with curved ramps and concrete structures
vehicle headlights and taillights moving along the highway ramps
illuminated corporate signage and advertisements on building facades
dark mountain range visible on the horizon behind the city

segments.scene_description: A static aerial view captures a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape during blue hour. The central corporate tower rises above the surrounding skyline, while an elevated freeway interchange winds through the foreground with sparse traffic. Neon signs illuminate the distant buildings, and rain droplets speckle the camera lens, creating a moody, atmospheric scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static aerial perspective of a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape during the moody atmosphere of blue hour. It begins with a wide view of the urban expanse, where a central corporate tower dominates the skyline above a network of illuminated glass skyscrapers. As the eye wanders through the frame, the focus shifts toward an elevated freeway interchange in the foreground where sparse traffic glides through the city's arteries. The scene is further defined by distant neon signs casting a glow over the architecture, while rain droplets speckle the lens to enhance the desaturated, cinematic mood.
